## TRM1.5. Vertical flight efficiency of the climb (PI#8)

Compared to the overall RP4 average value (34.8 seconds per flight), average times flown level during climb are on average 19.9 seconds per flight higher in Austria. The highest average time flown level during climb happens at Salzburg (LOWS) (71.3 seconds per flight), while the lowest happens at Vienna (LOWW) (41.6 seconds per flight).
